productDisplayName: FIFA Mens Red Card Grey T-shirt
description: Composition100% Cotton(180 gsm), Crew Neck half sleeves t-shirtThe t-shirt graphic represents the First "Red Card" issued on June 14, 1974. The back graphic of the T-shirt represents the fastest send off time & the latest send off time between 64 matches.Cool, casual and comfy, t-shirts are perhaps the best thing invented in clothing. Slipping into a T-shirt and getting started is always a breeze. It's the perennial all-occasion outfit that remains a favourite with one and all. Parties, get-togethers, Friday dressing or simply a walk in the park, t-shirts are an ideal Fit for any occasion. The appeal of T-shirts only gets more as they are available in lots of colours, various fits and sizes. So all it takes  is the desire to wear a T-shirt and one would be spoilt for choice pretty soon. Stuff up the wardrobe or stack up your room with T-shirts that suit your style and taste. Go on and join the ever growing fan club for T-shirts.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in T-shirtsHeight-5.11", Shoulders-17.5 "
